query: How do I configure an LLM node with memory and context?
expected_behavior: Shows memory config with window.enabled and size
Shows context config with variable_selector pointing to knowledge node
Notes memory only works in advanced-chat mode

query: I need a code node that parses JSON and extracts specific fields
expected_behavior: Shows proper main() function with dict return
Defines outputs matching return dict keys
Shows variable input referencing upstream node

query: How do I set up an HTTP request with bearer token auth?
expected_behavior: Shows authorization type api-key with bearer config
